name: ForgAI
description: Memecoin, originating from an AI application, brings you a blockchain-based generation tool—accessible to everyone, with permanent dividends! How to Participate: Burn tokens—Win BNB rewards—Everyone has a chance to win—Participation guarantees a return! Permanently burn tokens to win dividends + Token Burning Competition—BNB dividends; the more you burn, the higher your returns. Core Advantages: Supports direct AI dialogue to generate various tax-inclusive smart contracts, websites, images, PPTs, and videos.
